hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'packages/protocol/schemas/' || exit 0; cd ~/projects/llamenos && bun run codegen:check || echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"codegen:check failed after schema edit — run bun run codegen to regenerate types"}'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.dev\.vars|\.pem$|id_rsa$|id_ed25519$)' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Refusing to edit secret/env file. Edit manually if needed."}' || true
